sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98611" key="sumperai/wsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμπεραί-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n98611.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conclusion, sum</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῶν ἐτῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:137:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">137.24</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
